requirement_compliance.title: Fast-start embeddable session
requirement_compliance.notes: The game runs locally, builds for production, and fits the embeddable 16:9 container baseline.

requirement_compliance.title: Readable rescue-shooter core loop
requirement_compliance.notes: The player protects civilians moving to the bunker through a fixed-camera crosshair-based loop with visible outcomes.

requirement_compliance.title: Deterministic target and penalty rules
requirement_compliance.notes: Friendly fire, zombie-contact penalties, and overlap resolution now match the approved baseline.

requirement_compliance.title: Escalating pressure with three zombie categories
requirement_compliance.notes: Normal, elite, and brute threats are present with level-based escalation and mixed threat/protection pressure.

requirement_compliance.title: Scoring, level closure, and record persistence
requirement_compliance.notes: HUD, end-of-level flow, game-over flow, and local high-score persistence are implemented.

requirement_compliance.title: Professional presentation quality baseline
requirement_compliance.notes: Distinct visual/audio feedback exists for major action classes and the HUD layout was hardened for target resolutions.

requirement_compliance.title: Local asset provenance and runtime safety
requirement_compliance.notes: Gameplay-critical assets are inventory-backed, local-safe, and covered by runtime path controls.

technical_debt_inherited: Production build emits a large chunk warning that should be optimized in a later performance pass.
